title: Enphase Energy Q3 2020 Earnings Preview
text: Enphase Energy Q3 2020 earnings preview showed consensus EPS Estimate of $0.24 (-20.0% Y/Y) and consensus Revenue Estimate of $169.28M (-6.0% Y/Y). Over prior 2 years, ENPH beat EPS estimates 75% and beat revenue estimates 88% of time. Q3 2020 showed expected year-over-year declines in earnings and revenue though company maintained solid track record of beating estimates.
